summary: Ship gate can proceed for the narrowed r2 scope. P-1 is resolved: the plan now characterizes unauthorized actor -> 403 across open/finalized/stale states as one authz invariant, the lock points to red sha e469e4b, and the committed controller-level regression test asserts PATCH/DELETE outsider cases at the real route/service seam. The verify-red record exists, matches that sha/tree, and records regression failed with G3-AUTHZ while characterization stayed green. No new critical issue found. Simpler alternative: none materially simpler within the required author-or-payer-or-admin rule.
